expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Case focus coverage check (hyperlink-style separation)”, the output explicitly distinguishes the two conditions: “cells/objects with contextual links (should show hyperlink styling + indicator)” vs “cells/objects without contextual links (should render as ordinary grid text without hyperlink styling/indicator)”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md states: “Cannot verify phase4a output alignment in practice (artifact missing from evidence)” and later: “Output aligns with primary phase phase4a: Not verifiable (no phase4a output artifacts provided in evidence).” Since alignment is not demonstrated with phase4a artifacts, this expectation is not met.
